info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
华中科技大学、华为技术有限公司和上海交通大学介绍了基于两张稀疏视角图像
通过重设计几何重建模型和颜色增强算法
实现高效一致的三维人体高斯体快速重建的方法
The Huazhong University of Science and Technology

and Shanghai Jiaotong University presented a geometry reconstruction model that predicts consistent 3D human point clouds from only two images by redesigning foundation reconstruction models and applying an enhancement algorithm to supplement missing color information
which are then transformed into 3D Gaussians for rendering
info_EN: The Huazhong University of Science and Technology

and Shanghai Jiaotong University presented a geometry reconstruction model that predicts consistent 3D human point clouds from only two images by redesigning foundation reconstruction models and applying an enhancement algorithm to supplement missing color information
which are then transformed into 3D Gaussians for rendering
